title: Resume

pwrMsc.school: Wrocław University of Science and Technology

highlights: Designed and shipped CPO backend solutions (OCPI, OCPP, BOCPP protocols).

outcomes: Enabled stable international EV charging operations.
Helped product teams integrate new features faster through consistent APIs.
Reduced downtime risk for critical CPO services.

highlights: Developed UK payments systems: BACS (batch) and Faster Payments (real-time).

Made safer change possible in payment core systems through stronger contracts and monitoring.
